title: IIT Jammu Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Project Assistant Posts
description: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Jammu has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Project Assistant Jobs. Those candidates who have completed their B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Electrical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering can use this opportunity and apply for the IIT Jammu Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Inte...
